needed_evidence: Country-share table or source-backed top-three refining concentration detail for lithium processing/refining, ideally with annual values.
analytical_use: Would test whether the observed large processing/refining concentration gap remains robust under clearer country-share evidence.
candidate_source_family: IEA Global Critical Minerals Outlook, IEA Critical Minerals Data Explorer, USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries, national geological/statistical agencies, public company or industry association data only if denominator is clear.
acceptance_criteria: Source must identify year, geography, product definition, denominator, and country or producer share basis. Values must be traceable to a source table, chart, or explicit source statement.
allowed_claim_after_enrichment: May strengthen bounded descriptive confidence that processing/refining concentration is higher than mine-production concentration for this mineral.
blocked_claims: Still blocked: investment signal, policy recommendation, geopolitical ranking, bottleneck proof, disruption probability, company-level control, vulnerability ranking, or complete supply-chain risk conclusion.
